## 3. Assets Not Discovered (23 assets)

| Subnet | Missing Assets | Reason |
|--------|---------------|--------|
| 10.50.4.0/24 (App Servers) | 2 | Powered off during scan window — transient dev instances |
| 10.50.8.0/24 (Engineering WS) | 8 | Laptops offline (travel/remote) during scan window |
| 10.50.9.0/24 (Business WS) | 5 | Laptops offline (travel/remote) during scan window |
| 10.50.11.0/24 (Staging) | 3 | Ephemeral containers terminated between CMDB snapshot and scan |
| 10.50.6.0/24 (CI/CD) | 1 | Build agent decommissioned — CMDB not yet updated |
| 10.50.0.0/24 (Infrastructure) | 4 | Scan credentials expired for 4 network devices — refreshed Dec 3 |

## 4. Authentication Failures

31 of 1,127 discovered assets had authentication failures (2.7%):

- 18 corporate workstations — local scan agent service stopped (restarted by IT Operations)
- 9 staging instances — Vault credential rotation timing conflict (resolved)
- 4 network devices — SNMP community string changed without scan config update (resolved Dec 3)

## 5. Scan Tool Health

All three scanning platforms operational throughout Q4:
- Qualys VMDR: 99.8% uptime (12 minutes planned maintenance Nov 15)
- AWS Inspector: 100% uptime
- CrowdStrike Spotlight: 100% uptime

## 6. Recommendations

1. Implement staggered scan windows to capture offline laptops
2. Automate CMDB-to-scan-config synchronization for credential updates
3. Deploy Qualys Cloud Agent on remote endpoints for scan independence from network connectivity
